PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?person ?name((YEAR(MAX(?end)) - YEAR(MIN(?start))) AS ?totalYears) WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P31 wd:Q5 ; rdfs:label ?name .
  FILTER(LANG(?name) = "en")
  ?person p:P39 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P39 wd:Q13218630 ; pq:P580 ?start ; pq:P582 ?end .
  FILTER(DATATYPE(?start) = xsd:dateTime && DATATYPE(?end) = xsd:DateTime)
}
GROUP BY ?person ?name
ORDER BY DESC(?totalYears)
LIMIT 1
